Class SystemStartupImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.startup.SystemStartupImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
SystemStartup
public class SystemStartupImpl extends Object implements SystemStartup
Coordinates startup for the shelter CLI application. This class owns the startup sequence: bootstrap the work directory, create repositories, restore loaded relationships, and build the application graph.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SystemStartupImpl()
    Constructs startup using the default ~/shelter work directory.
    SystemStartupImpl(Path shelterHome)
    Constructs startup using a caller-provided shelter work directory.
    SystemStartupImpl(Path shelterHome, WorkdirBootstrapper workdirBootstrapper, CsvRepositoryFactory repositoryFactory, ShelterAnimalLinker shelterAnimalLinker)
    Constructs startup with explicit helper objects.

  • Constructor Details

    • SystemStartupImpl

      public SystemStartupImpl()
      Constructs startup using the default ~/shelter work directory. This constructor is used by the CLI when running in the normal demo environment.

    • SystemStartupImpl

      public SystemStartupImpl(Path shelterHome)
      Constructs startup using a caller-provided shelter work directory. This constructor supports tests that should not write into the real user home directory.
      Parameters:
      shelterHome - the base shelter work directory

    • SystemStartupImpl

      public SystemStartupImpl(Path shelterHome, WorkdirBootstrapper workdirBootstrapper, CsvRepositoryFactory repositoryFactory, ShelterAnimalLinker shelterAnimalLinker)
      Constructs startup with explicit helper objects. This keeps startup orchestration testable without introducing a dependency injection framework.
      Parameters:
      shelterHome - the base shelter work directory
      workdirBootstrapper - prepares the work directory before repository loading
      repositoryFactory - creates and loads CSV repositories
      shelterAnimalLinker - restores shelter-to-animal links after CSV loading

  • Method Details

    • instance

      public static SystemStartupImpl instance()
      Returns the shared startup instance used by the CLI. The instance is initialized before it is returned so callers can immediately use its getters.
      Returns:
      the shared startup implementation instance

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the system once for the current process. Repeated calls are safe and return immediately after the application graph has been built.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface SystemStartup

    • animalApp

      public AnimalApplicationService animalApp()
      Provides access to the animal application service, initializing the system if not yet started. Delegates retrieval to the fully wired ApplicationGraph.
      Returns:
      the animal application service

    • adopterApp

      public AdopterApplicationService adopterApp()
      Provides access to the adopter application service, initializing the system if not yet started. Delegates retrieval to the fully wired ApplicationGraph.
      Returns:
      the adopter application service

    • shelterApp

      public ShelterApplicationService shelterApp()
      Provides access to the shelter application service, initializing the system if not yet started. Delegates retrieval to the fully wired ApplicationGraph.
      Returns:
      the shelter application service

    • adoptionApp

      public AdoptionApplicationService adoptionApp()
      Provides access to the adoption application service, initializing the system if not yet started. Delegates retrieval to the fully wired ApplicationGraph.
      Returns:
      the adoption request application service

    • transferApp

      public TransferApplicationService transferApp()
      Provides access to the transfer application service, initializing the system if not yet started. Delegates retrieval to the fully wired ApplicationGraph.
      Returns:
      the transfer request application service

      Provides access to the matching application service, initializing the system if not yet started. Delegates retrieval to the fully wired ApplicationGraph.
